summary: Phase 3 'Growth & Gather' testing complete - All 32 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend features verified. New features: table purpose field (6 types), prayer/intention shared items, public /join/:code invite landing page, Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI event suggestions.
critical_code_review_comments: Public invite preview endpoint correctly returns 404 for invalid codes and 410 for expired/used-up invites
AI suggestions endpoint gracefully returns empty list on failure (no 500 errors)
Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration via emergentintegrations library is working - returns tailored suggestions based on table purpose
Prayer and Intention item types properly integrated with HeartHandshake and Sparkles icons
PendingInviteHandler correctly uses sessionStorage['rt-pending-code'] for post-registration redirect
seed_data_creation: Test Bible Study table with invite code HO4IIE6D pre-created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 complete. All features verified: (1) Table purpose field with 6 types (family/bible_study/community/friends/work/other) - default 'other', validation rejects invalid. (2) Prayer & Intention shared item types with proper icons (HeartHandshake purple, Sparkles yellow). (3) Public /join/:code route works without auth, shows table preview with purpose badge, inviter info, member count. Invalid codes show friendly error. Logged-in users see 'Take My Seat', guests see 'Create Account & Join'. (4) AI suggestions via Claude Sonnet 4.5 - returns 3 tailored events based on table purpose. Bible study tables get faith-themed suggestions. (5) ShareBadge in BadgeUnlock modal creates invite and uses navigator.share with clipboard fallback. All Phase 1+2 features still working (regression verified).

backend_phase3.table_purpose: POST /api/tables accepts purpose field (family/bible_study/community/friends/work/other), defaults to 'other', rejects invalid values
backend_phase3.old_item_types: All existing item types (photo/document/video/audio/link/note/spreadsheet/presentation) still work
backend_phase3.invite_preview_public: GET /api/invites/preview/{code} - PUBLIC endpoint, returns table/inviter/uses/max_uses, 404 for invalid, 410 for expired
backend_phase3.suggest_events_membership: POST /api/tables/{id}/suggest-events requires table membership (403 for non-members)
backend_phase3.suggest_events_ai: Returns {suggestions:[], purpose} with 0-3 AI-generated events, graceful failure returns empty list
backend_phase3.ai_quality: Claude Sonnet 4.5 returns tailored suggestions - Bible study tables get faith/prayer/fellowship themes

frontend_phase3.join_public_route: /join/:code renders without login, shows table name, purpose badge, inviter avatar+name, member count
frontend_phase3.join_cta_guest: Guest sees 'Create Account & Join' button + 'Sign in' link
frontend_phase3.join_cta_logged_in: Logged-in user sees 'Take My Seat' button
frontend_phase3.join_invalid_code: Invalid/expired code shows friendly error with 'Go to Sign In' link
frontend_phase3.join_pending_handler: PendingInviteHandler uses sessionStorage['rt-pending-code'] for post-auth redirect
frontend_phase3.create_table_purpose: CreateTableModal shows 6-purpose picker grid (Family/Bible Study/Community/Friends/Work/Other) with distinct colors+icons
frontend_phase3.smart_suggestions: SmartSuggestions widget in TableView right column, 'Ask Claude' button calls AI endpoint, renders 3 suggestion cards
frontend_phase3.suggestion_add: 'Add' button on suggestion cards creates event, card disappears
frontend_phase3.share_prayer_intention: ShareItemModal type grid includes Prayer (HeartHandshake purple) and Intention (Sparkles yellow) with textarea prompts
frontend_phase3.roundtable_viz_items: RoundTableViz renders prayer items with HeartHandshake icon + purple, intention with Sparkles + yellow

regression_phase1_phase2.portal: All 6 widgets present (Today's Schedule, Recent on Tables, My Tables, Quick Actions, Invites & Referrals, Notifications)
regression_phase1_phase2.navigation: Calendar, Messages, Contacts, Apps, Settings all accessible
regression_phase1_phase2.table_view: Round table visualization, LIVE badge, members, shared items, events, table chat all working

mocked_apis.walkie_audio: MOCKED - UI + beep only, no real audio streaming
mocked_apis.video_call: MOCKED - UI overlay only, no real WebRTC streams
mocked_apis.ai_suggestions: REAL - Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent Universal LLM key
